# GGG Technologies

> GGG Technologies is a UK-based specialist IT support and infrastructure company serving the hospitality industry — hotels, boutique properties, luxury resorts, serviced apartments, and B&Bs across London and the UK.

## What We Do

GGG Technologies provides end-to-end IT services designed specifically for the hotel sector. Unlike generalist IT companies, every service we offer is built around the operational demands of hospitality: 24/7 uptime, guest experience, PCI DSS compliance, and seamless front-desk and back-office integration.

## Core Services

- **24/7 IT Helpdesk** — Round-the-clock remote support with guaranteed response times
- **On-Site IT Support** — Engineer visits across London and the UK for hands-on fixes
- **Remote Support** — Fast remote diagnostics and resolution without engineer callout
- **Guest WiFi** — Enterprise-grade guest wireless networks with bandwidth management
- **Network & WiFi Solutions** — Full LAN/WLAN design, installation and management
- **Cabling Infrastructure** — Structured cabling, Cat6/fibre, patch panels
- **Firewall & Security** — Next-gen firewall configuration and network security
- **Cyber Security** — Threat monitoring, vulnerability assessment, staff training
- **PCI DSS Compliance** — Hotel payment security compliance consulting and implementation
- **CCTV & Security** — IP camera systems, NVR/DVR, remote monitoring
- **Access Control** — Key card, biometric and electronic door entry systems
- **PMS Hotel Systems** — Property Management System setup, support and troubleshooting
- **PMS Integration** — Integration of PMS with payment, booking and EPOS systems
- **Smart Room Technology** — Automated room controls, digital guest services
- **Digital Signage** — In-lobby and in-room digital display systems
- **Voice Solutions** — Hotel VOIP phone systems and front-desk telephony
- **IT Consultancy** — Strategic IT planning and project management for hotels

## Industries Served

- Boutique Hotels
- Luxury Resorts & Spa Hotels
- Chain Hotels & Hotel Groups
- Conference & Events Hotels
- Bed & Breakfast Properties
- Serviced Apartments

## Areas Covered

**London:** Mayfair, Kensington, Chelsea, Westminster, Soho, Covent Garden, Canary Wharf, Shoreditch, South Bank, Bloomsbury, Paddington, Central London

**UK Regions:** Midlands, South East England (and expanding)

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Company type: B2B IT managed services provider (MSP)
- Specialisation: Hospitality / hotel sector only
- Geography: United Kingdom (primarily London)
- Availability: 24/7 support coverage
- Compliance expertise: PCI DSS, GDPR
- Target customers: Hotel owners, general managers, operations directors, IT managers in hospitality
